programme.title: Bebefinn Boo Boo Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Boo Boo Song
programme.desc: Ouch, ouch, it hurts! Help me! I was running and playing outside today! Ouch! I got hurt while running fast and sliding down the slide. Mommy, Daddy! Please make it better so it doesn’t hurt anymore!

programme.title: Pinkfong!, Did you know that?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong!, Did you know that?
programme.desc: Who will win — the sharp-toothed shark or the big, strong killer whale? Let's find out who's the real king of the ocean! Join Pinkfong and Ninimo to watch the exciting battle!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Episode 7
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Episode 8
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Halloween Dance Party
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Halloween Dance Party
programme.desc: It’s Halloween time again! Join the fun and dance along with adorable little monsters!

programme.title: Baby Shark Stole My Heart Again!
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 Baby Shark Stole My Heart Again!
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the sparkling superstar of the universe! Thanks for loving us for 10 years—are you ready for even more songs and dances?

programme.title: Baby Shark Dinosaur Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Baby Shark transforms into a dinosaur! Triceratops! Tyrannosaurus! Roar! The scary Tyrannosaurus Shark is chasing us! Run away, friends~!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Bebefinn 4 Ep10
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Baby Shark the Dentist
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Oh no, it looks like you have a tooth injury, so you've come to the dentist! Dr. Baby Shark will take care of everything for you! Alright, let's start the treatment. Please open wide and say "Ahh"!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Look what we found! Our friends have discovered mysterious, colorful dinosaur eggs! Place them in the magic incubator and watch them change colors. What kind of mighty dinosaurs will hatch from these rainbow eggs? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Catch the Thief Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Catch the Thief Shark Family!
programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun.

programme.title: Learn Colors with Hogi
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Episode 6
programme.desc: Learn colors with Hogi and Wonderville Friends!

programme.title: Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Learn Nursery Rhymes with Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo

programme.title: Boo and Mandoo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Boo and Mandoo
programme.desc: Meet Boo the cat and Mandoo the puppy! They’re always bickering—but can they become friends? Maybe a game of ball will bring them closer!

programme.title: Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.desc: Wonder Star friends are sick! Join Hogi and Forest as they become doctors and heal their friends!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark Hospital Play Song
programme.desc: Ta-da! Baby Shark Hospital Play is now open! Doctor Baby Shark is here to fix any boo-boo. Let's wash away the germs and get healthy with the catchy tunes of 'Baby Shark’s Hospital Play'! Next patient, please!

programme.title: Dance Adventure
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Arrr-! Are you ready for a fun adventure? Come and let's sing and dance together! Arrr-!

programme.title: Kikipuppup
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Meow Meow, Woof Woof! Bickering Again Today! Meet the cute rivals, Kiki & Puppo— and… Vex! A fun story about a cute cat and dog, sharing little laughs, heartwarming moments, and tiny bits of growing up every day!

programme.title: We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.desc: Cough, cough! Sniffle, sniffle! Help me, Doctor! I don’t feel well. Bebefinn and Minjee are having a 'Hospital Play' day! Don’t worry—Doctor Bebefinn and Minjee will make you feel all better with a magic touch. Let’s play doctor!

programme.title: Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.desc: Join the Bebefinn family and meet five friendly farm animals! From cows and ducks to sheep, pigs, and bunnies—it’s time to wiggle, shake, and dance along! Are you ready to move like an animal?

programme.title: Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.desc: Pineapple pizza or chocolate pizza? It’s time for the Bebefinn family’s special pizza-making adventure! What do you think it will taste like? Let’s use our imagination!

programme.title: Catch the Thief Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Catch the Thief Shark Family!
programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Epsiode 10
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Ninimo is Sick
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ninimo is Sick
programme.desc: Ninimo has caught a cold! Become a doctor with Hogi and Forest to treat sick Ninimo!

programme.title: Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.desc: What’s the weather like today? Sunny, rainy, windy, or snowy—there are so many kinds of weather to explore! Let’s learn all about weather with Bebefinn!

programme.title: The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.desc: Oh no! Mommy Shark has cavities, Daddy Shark has a broken tooth, and Big Brother Shark’s teeth have turned yellow! Doctor Baby Shark and friends are here to help make them healthy again!

programme.title: Happy 1st Birthday Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family.

programme.title: Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.desc: The Bebefinn family looks back on the year while flipping through their photo album. What fun things happened to the Bebefinn family this year? It was a happy year because everyone was together. Let’s fill the new year with even more sweet and happy moments with the Bebefinn family!

programme.title: We are Construction Vehicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We are Construction Vehicles
programme.desc: Oh no, the bridge has collapsed! Let’s head to the construction site with Hoi and his team of construction vehicles!

programme.title: Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.title: Baby Shark Boulevard
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the beloved global star, is on the move! To meet fans from all around the world, Baby Shark is setting out on an exciting journey. Join the adventure and meet Baby Shark!

programme.title: Pinkfong Healthy Habits Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Stay healthy and happy every one! Kick-start your day with Pinkfong healthy habits song.

programme.title: Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Learn Nursery Rhymes with Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Episode 7
programme.desc: Jenni likes things that sparkle. But oops! Because Jenni shoved all these knick-knacks back in the closet, the door won't open again! Wonderstar persuades Jenni to decorate the threes outside with the sparkly stuff instead. Where did all my tools go?! The great inventor Poki's tools are keep disappearing. What! the screwdriver is gone! Oh well, my wrench just went missing too...

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Episode 8
programme.desc: Quick delivery! Jordi's ice cream cart got stuck in mud. Help Jordi get the cheese ice cream in time before it melts. Let's go Wonderstars! Rachel sings Wonderville's super popular song 'Yum Yum Pie' and the friends shout for the encore! But nobody wants to hear the songs that Rachel wrote. Wonderstar suggests a concert with Rachel's amazing songs! Will they succeed?

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Episode 9
programme.desc: Chumli got coverd in sticky acorn nut butter! Help me, Wonderstar! I have to wash it off before my body turns into a statue! Here's the mission! Find the missing bananas! The bananas that are supposed to be in Codi's cart are all gone. What happened? Codi finds Wonderstar for help.

programme.title: Bebefinn Playtime
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Follow the fun-filled story of Shark Family and pick up numbers, colors, and cool ocean facts along the way! Are you ready? Let’s dive into the underwater adventure together!

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Budae Jjigae
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Budae Jjigae! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Chubby Boy Breakfast Hash
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Chubby Boy Breakfast Hash! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Tuna Casserole
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Tuna Casserole! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Tailgate Feast: Gameday Grub
programme.desc: Game day traditions meet sizzling creativity as familiar favorites hit the griddle. From sliders to smoky wings, these dishes celebrate casual gatherings and the inventive ways home chefs turn everyday ingredients into shareable, crowd-pleasing bites.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Fusion Well-Done
programme.desc: Around the world in one meal, global flavors come together on the griddle. Vibrant spices, sauces, and ingredients mix to form creative fusions that celebrate connection through food, offering a taste of adventure in every sizzling, flavorful bite.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 30-Minute Meals on the Fly
programme.desc: Fast and flavorful come together as griddles work overtime to deliver delicious meals in under thirty minutes. Quick cooking meets bold taste, showing that great food can be effortless, even on the busiest of days.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Cucumber Salad, Chicken, Noodles and Fritters
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, Thai cucumber salad! Next, pomegranate-glazed chicken! Followed by cheesy sweet potato noodles! Finishing with honey-cheese fritters!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The World Central Kitchen Cookbook
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The World Central Kitchen Cookbook by José Andrés! Follow along as Shahir prepares dishes that World Central Kitchen makes as part of disaster relief efforts all over the world, including beef rendang from Indonesia, lahmajoun from Armenia, potatoes from the Canary Island, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Generous Meal
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from an award-winning cookbook: A Generous Meal by his culinary school classmate, Christine Flynn! Follow along as Shahir makes craveable pumpkin stuffed shells, a juicy porkchop with fennel slaw, a refreshing peach and corn salad, and much more!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 More Gavan Knox
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next Gavan Knox as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Erica Karbelnik
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next Erica Karbelnik as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation

programme.desc: Game day traditions meet sizzling creativity as familiar favorites hit the griddle. From sliders to smoky wings, these dishes celebrate casual gatherings and the inventive ways home chefs turn everyday ingredients into shareable, crowd-pleasing bites.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Fusion Well-Done
programme.desc: Around the world in one meal, global flavors come together on the griddle. Vibrant spices, sauces, and ingredients mix to form creative fusions that celebrate connection through food, offering a taste of adventure in every sizzling, flavorful bite.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 30-Minute Meals on the Fly
programme.desc: Fast and flavorful come together as griddles work overtime to deliver delicious meals in under thirty minutes. Quick cooking meets bold taste, showing that great food can be effortless, even on the busiest of days.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Pizza Take-Out
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Thai Take-Out
programme.desc: Toss out the take-out menu! In just 30 minutes, host Spencer Watts shows us how to cook a mouth-watering Thai take-out dinner for four.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Japanese Take-Out
programme.desc: Instead of going out for dinner, Spencer Watts cooks up a Japanese Take-out feast for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Garbanzo Beans and Grapefruit
programme.desc: In this fast-paced episode, host Theresa Visintin uses two unlikely ingredients that start with the letter "G," garbanzo beans and grapefruit! First up, Theresa cooks socca, a savoury garbanzo bean pancake recipe, and infuses it with Mediterranean flavours. To make her batter, Theresa combines chickpea flour with salty olives, sweet red pepper, and fresh basil. Once the batter is ready to go, she fries the savoury crepe. Next up, Theresa balances tart grapefruit with a sweet buttery lobster tail. But that's not sweet enough for Theresa! She prepares sabayon, a delicate honey custard that melts in your mouth. Finally, Theresa shows us how to make a mouth-watering dish by combining...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E18 Chicken and Corn
programme.desc: Chicken and corn are the key players in this letter “C” challenge. Chef Lauren Gulyas prepares one of her favourite Italian dishes, chicken Marsala. Using garlic, shallots, and white wine, Chef Lauren whips up a rich Marsala sauce that is nutty and floral in flavour. Next, she transforms corn into a creamy polenta topping for her Shepard’s pie...with a twist! Sautéing onion, garlic, and lean ground beef, she uses Worcestershire sauce and tomato paste to give the pie filling an extra flavour boost. Once she finishes those dishes, Chef Lauren creates a mouth-watering recipe that combines both chicken and corn.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Kaffir Lime and Kohlrabi
programme.desc: Chef Robert Jewell has a challenge on his hands after picking the letter “K.” He decides to use ingredients kaffir lime and kohlrabi. First, Robert re-invents the ordinary shrimp skewer, using lemongrass as the skewer (yes, the skewer!). He brings the flavour to the next level with zesty kaffir lime. Using the leaves of the kaffir lime with fresh herbs, Robert makes a dipping sauce for the skewer. Next, Robert fries up salty peameal bacon in one pan and sautés earthy kohlrabi with leeks, potato, and garlic in another. He brings the ingredients together into a single skillet, adding eggs and baking it into a hearty frittata. For his final dish, Robert uses both kaffir lime and kohlrabi in...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Mango and Mustard
programme.desc: “A” is on the menu and Chef Robert Jewell takes on this meal challenge with apricots and avocados. First up, Robert cooks a spicy roasted quail and drizzles it with some sweet apricot and calvados sauce. Next, is a meal best served cold! Robert slices up sushi-grade tuna and transforms it into a flavourful tartare, brought to life by rich avocado and refreshing lime. On the side, he adds crusty crostini with savoury soy sauce and sesame oil, the perfect complement for this meltin- your-mouth meal. For his final dish, Robert combines apricots and avocados for an unbelievably tasty dish.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Vinegar
programme.desc: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how vinegar, a simple pantry staple, can bring out the flavours of walleye, lobster and crawfish.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Cocktails
programme.desc: Seafood lover and chef Spencer Watts brings the party to the kitchen and shows that cocktails aren't just for drinking, they're also an inspiration for cooking great seafood.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Cold
programme.desc: Cooking doesn't always have to bring the heat. Chef and fish lover Spencer Watts shows you how to prepare cold dishes with arctic char and shrimp.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Wrapped
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts has fun wrapping some of his favourite seafood to create delicious dishes with swordfish and shrimp.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Breakfast for Dinner
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make breakfast for dinner for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: a veggie frittata, sweet and peppery bacon, a cottage cheese pancake stack, and fruit skewers!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Game Day
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a game day spread for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: buffalo veggie pakora wings with yogurt ranch, quesadillas with fresh guacamole, black bean chili, and root beer floats!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Teatime Treats
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a teatime spread for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cucumber sandwiches, ham and cheese deviled eggs, lemon scones with raspberry jam, and matcha white chocolate-covered strawberries!

programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Food Truck Take-Out
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts takes just 30 minutes to make classic food truck fare, without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Greek Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a delicious Greek feast in around 30 minutes, for under 30 dollars.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E19 Rice and Rosemary
programme.desc: In this "R" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas shows us how to use rice and rosemary in delicious meals.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Lamb and Licorice
programme.desc: After picking the letter "L," Chef Robert Jewell takes on lamb and licorice in this ingredient challenge. He starts with aromatic Moroccan lamb riblets, an appetizer that will make you want this spicy dish as your main course too. Next, Robert takes it up a notch by showing us how to make licorice - yes, the candy! He brings coconut oil, brown sugar, creamed coconut, and molasses to boil before skillfully adding flour and anise to make sweet, chewy coconut licorice. Finally, Robert concocts the perfect recipe that combines succulent lamb with sweet licorice.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Radicchio and Raisins
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin creates savoury meals in this letter "R" challenge featuring radicchios and raisins. First, Theresa chops up bold and bitter radicchios, grilling them until the edges are a crispy golden brown and perfect for a warm wedge salad. Then, she tosses fried pancetta and earthy portobello mushrooms in a luxurious champagne vinegar and pours it over the crispy radicchio. Theresa tops this warm salad with creamy crumbled goat's cheese. For her next dish, Theresa prepares a rum raisin sauce using golden sultana raisins, dark rum, and fresh orange. Theresa pours the sauce over succulent ham. Is your mouth watering yet? Finally, Theresa combines radicchio and raisin into a...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E20 Pork and Peanuts
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Garlic
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with escargot mushroom puff pastry tarts and more.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Seeds
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts is all about the often forgotten seeds as he shows how much flavor they can add to sole and squid.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Peppers
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts spices things up in the kitchen as he makes peppERS-inspired dishes with catfish and clams.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Sweet
programme.desc: Satisfy your craving for something sweet with these delicious sablefish and lobster dishes from chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 Beef Tenderloin Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Beef Tenderloin is prized for its exceptional quality; Chef Katie Ardington is a talented teacher for showcasing its many virtues"...

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Sunshine and Showers
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Veggies Galore
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 No Cutlery Required
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 Vietnamese Street Food
programme.desc: There's nothing more authentic than street food - Vietnamese style! Host Lisa Nguyen shares her tips and tricks on tasty Lemongrass-infused Beef Wraps. A vast array of ingredients including peppery betel leaves, gorgeous greens and crunchy peanuts complement the tenderness of flavoursome, marinated ground beef. Lisa's next dish is an iconic Vietnamese street food - crispy Sizzling Crepes with juicy pork belly and earthy vegetables will definitely activate your taste buds. For dessert, Lisa whips up a batch of sweet coconut pudding using beautiful bananas and velvety coconut milk sprinkled with roasted sesame seeds for some crunch.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 Stuffed
programme.desc: The Lebanese love their stuffed foods, and host Jasmin Ibrahim shows us just how to do it! To start, she eloquently crafts golden Spinach and Feta Turnovers. Then, she stuffs a delicious zucchini with tender beef, crunchy nuts, and soft basmati rice, and smothers it in a flavourful tomato sauce. Next up, Stuffed Lamb and Bulgur Balls - small torpedo shaped balls of juicy minced meat, light and nutty bulgur, and a medley of aromatic spices. Her final dish? A date-stuffed cookie called Maamoul. Normally made for special occasions, these sweet cookies burst with flavour.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E23 Olives: The Most Useful Ingredient
programme.desc: Is there anything more Greek than olives? Host Joanna Chery shows us how versatile the olive really is by cooking up four diverse Greek dishes. To start, a rich, baked-to-perfection Olive Bread loaded with strong, slightly fruity black Kalamata olives. She then prepares a refreshing Greek Village Salad full of seasonal vegetables, creamy feta, and plump juicy olives tossed in extra virgin olive oil. And guess what? It pairs great with fried Olive Bread! Then, Joanna switches it up with wonderful green olives - the star in her delicious stuffing for Apricot and Feta-Stuffed Chicken Thighs. Finally, we're graced with a unique dessert - Saint Fanourios Cake. Joanna adds metaxa (Greek...

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Game Day
programme.desc: Our fun and occasionally silly chef-host Kimberly Lallouz is taking on a Game Day menu for whatever bowl, cup, or ring your favourite team is bringing home this year! Wear your team colors and cook along as she updates perennial favourites like Chicken Wings (...grilled and smothered in savoury Suya spice!) and Loaded Nachos (with blue corn chips and decadently vegan with her chipotle-cashew 'cheeze!') Next, her Philly-style cheesy flank steak hoagie is a sure crowd pleaser, and for a final play, it's back to the grill with shrimp skewer made Buffalo-style with hot sauce, butter, and creamy avocado ranch dressing. Game on!

programme.desc: Aqua Viva presenta al Pastor Sergio Hornung cada semana compartiendo un mensaje cargado de fe, vision y herramientas practicas.

programme.title: El cielo en la Tierra

programme.title: Voz News

programme.title: Sid Roth - ¡Es Sobrenatural!
programme.desc: Sid Roth, un judío creyente en Jesús, ha pasado más de 35 años investigando la cualidad sobrenatural de Dios. Buscando guiarte al caminar en lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Rick Renner revela cómo los creyentes pueden entender el Arrebatamiento de manera bíblica y vivir sin miedo mientras esperan el regreso de Cristo.

programme.title: Marcus Lamb
programme.desc: Únete a Marcus Lamb en Cornerstone Church en San Antonio, Texas para un profundo mensaje sobre la substancia más preciosa en el mundo - la sangre de Jesús.

programme.title: Aqua viva con Sergio Hornung
programme.desc: Aqua Viva presenta al Pastor Sergio Hornung cada semana compartiendo un mensaje cargado de fe, vision y herramientas practicas.

programme.title: Adoración en casa
programme.desc: Transforme la atmósfera de lo que sea que esté enfrentando a través del poder de la adoración con Josh Morales.

programme.title: Voz News
programme.desc: Karina Yapor y destacados periodistas analizan con profundidad las noticias de hoy.

programme.title: Michael A. Youssef
programme.desc: Dr. Michael Youssef, fundador de la Iglesia de los Apósteles en Atlanta, Georgia, entrega un mensaje poderoso e inspirador sobre la palabra de Dios.

programme.title: Reflections
programme.desc: Disfruta de impresionantes escenas de muchas de las creaciones milagrosas de Dios.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Ashford Co. Wicklow stands the house of Nigel and Frances Coffey. Frances's parents live next door. Several years ago her father built a private road and gave seven plots of land to his seven children.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Glenn Keating and Gustav van der Westhuizen live in Grace Park, Drumcondra, with their 5-year-old son Noah and two pet Weimaraner dogs. They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot had a journey to go on with this build with Lisa and Marc.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Laura's expectations from Dermot were high but to get the build to the construction stage was tricky due to the tight budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Paul and Hilary really want to modernise the house that was built originally in the 1970s but they have to be clever with their budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot has a challenge, as he has to work within a tight budget of 210k and has a lot to do for what Jim and Mary want.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Conor and Amy are a young couple who have made the decision to put down roots together by renovating an old farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revealed a plan that would facilitate the old abode to be renovated plus he added a rear extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Carmel and Hugh wanted a home which was going to be manageable for them both going into their later years in life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The Gray family have been living in the house for seventeen years, but they wanted to future proof it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Gráinne Murphy and Ivan Williams have been dreaming about renovating Ivan's forefather's old farmhouse for many years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Brian Carrigg and Kate Molony attempt to renovate a bungalow with a view of the Rock of Cashel that Kate has dreamed of owning all her life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sandra and Daniel Davey bought their dream home in Knocklyon, Dublin over four years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Ann Brannigan and her husband David are attempting to give Ann's former family home in Santry, Dublin a complete renovation.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Eimear Farrell, a single mum and her 8-year-old daughter Hannah with a budget of 20,000 euros (our smallest budget in the series) need the entire downstairs of the 2 bedroomed home in Ballybrack completely re-modelled.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: As it turns out, the only predictable thing about this build are delays caused by Dermot's obsessive attention to detail.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Glasnevin with Terry and Peadar Clarke and their two children Marie Bernadette and Luke.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: Dermot's vision for the house is mirrored by similarly grandiose ambitions for the garden - a wild jungle whose design he hands over to landscaper Diarmuid Gavin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon faces a tough challenge in meeting the design brief and budgetary restraints for the Zambra family who are building an extension in Castleknock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot Bannon helps a couple in Enniscorthy renovate an old cottage and prepare their home for a new baby.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In this week's programme, the penultimate of the series, Dermot finds himself the dream job.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Podge and Jo Ussher want to turn their Wexford cottage from a holiday home into their permanent home without sacrificing any of its 1930s charm.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: They bought their home at the end of the property boom and now it's worth less than they paid for it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Timahoe, Portlaoise with Dolores and Donal O'Connell. Their five children are all grown-up but still live in the area.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Cathy and Michael Keane bought their house when it was being used as a cowshed. They converted it, had four children and over the years Dad, Michael, has added on bits to it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Declan and Judy Cadwell from Clontarf share a small terraced home with their three sons, Christopher 19, Ross 17 and Jake 13. But only just.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marie Duffy moved into her Victorian townhouse off the South Circular Road four years ago. Her friends all thought she was mad to buy it because there was so much work to be done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot encounters a stumbling block or two when he turns his hand to a badly laid out bungalow in Co Offaly.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving into their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Yosemite Magic: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: Yosemite is known all over the world for its granite cliffs, waterfalls, and giant sequoias.

programme.title: Cunningham Cabin; Grand Teton National Park
programme.desc: Getting lost in the golden pastures of Grand Teton National Park.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende; offering some views that showcase the Dolomites mountain range.

programme.title: Muriwai Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The coast of Muriwai Beach with tides and rushing currents.

programme.title: Sunny Sandy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Unwinding by an idyllic stretch of sand where time stands still surrounded by luxurious flora and light navy blue waters.

programme.title: Snake Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Flying away to paradise and exploring the lush forests and turquoise waters of Snake Island, in the Philippines.

programme.title: Cathedral Cove: New Zealand
programme.desc: A stunning rock formation dots the rugged coastal waters of Cathedral Cove in New Zealand.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Exploring the Basdaku Beach.

programme.title: Soothing Stream: Quebec
programme.desc: This morning, autumn shines its magical, golden light on the rushing waters of the Parc national de la Jacques-Cartier.

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Earth From Above
programme.desc: Traveling the world with a birds-eye-view perspective of scenic wonders.

programme.title: Nusa Penida: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of Nusa Penida.

programme.title: Kerikeri: New Zealand
programme.desc: Traveling to northern New Zealand and beholding the vivid green vegetation.

programme.title: Cape Reinga & Giant Sand Dunes: New Zealand
programme.desc: Experiencing a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on the diverse beauty of Sri Lanka, where rainforests, quiet beaches and vibrant foliage put you in a dreamy trance of natural wonder.

programme.title: Yellow Wildflowers: France
programme.desc: In the French region of Dordogne, a field of yellow wildflowers grows as far as the eye can see.

programme.title: Pantai Ngopet: Indonesia

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Cyprus Akamas National Park
programme.desc: From being the primary mode of transport for many centuries to helping in the production of olive oil, the donkeys in Cyprus have truly earned the status of the national animal. Our host, Sabrina Chakici finds out more about them and their significance to the country when she visits a donkey farm. She also visits Akamas Peninsula National Park, one of the island country’s last remaining wildernesses.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Unwind The Palace Downtown, Dubai
programme.desc: Be it the world’s tallest building or one of the world’s largest man-made marinas, Dubai has always been a city firmly in charge of writing its own story. Renowned traveler, Sabrina discovers this, as she visits Dubai’s own tropical rainforest and a wildlife sanctuary that is home to wild flamingos. She also learns about the city's roots at Bastakiya, the old quarter full of sand-colored houses with open courtyards and narrow alleyways, and Al Fahidi Fort, the city's oldest structure.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Egypt Alexandria
programme.desc: Alexandria in Egypt is a city that has reinvented itself over the centuries but has not forgotten its roots.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels

programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage

programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 XP Guide, Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 City Breaks, Prague
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Backpack Belgrade, Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 XP Guide, Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.
